use_cases: Adding decorative dot, grid, or line patterns to section backgrounds
Creating textured backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Implementing fade masks for smooth edge transitions on background elements
Building customizable background layers for marketing sites and portfolios
Adding subtle visual interest to form containers or card backgrounds
ai_summary: A versatile background pattern component that generates CSS-based decorative patterns including dots, grids, diagonal stripes, horizontal/vertical lines, and checkerboard designs. Supports fade masks for edge transitions and customizable colors and sizes. Designed as a lightweight, reusable decorative layer for any section or container.
